MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: FRANK F. SARIOL'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF MILTON LOPEZ and JOSE QUIJADA: DENIED for failure to timely serve. Proof of service states service by mail on June 15, only 21 days before the hearing. (301/AS/) Reporter: Valerie Papale, CSR #6899
